creator: tz@freebsd.org
text:
Aloha,

when the non-default option TOC2MP3 is selected, it fails when staging with:
===>  Staging for cdrdao-1.2.3_5
===>   Generating temporary packing list
install: /usr/ports/sysutils/cdrdao/work/cdrdao-1.2.3/utils/toc2mp3: No such file or directory
*** Error code 71

The error is obvious but i'm not familiar enough with this port to come up with an patch. Hopefully you can fix this.

Checking my build-machine i see the first failure at 2017-04-24. Maybe some days before, since it was offline a few days.

Greetings,
Torsten
